subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1912-08-01
subcodes.first_line: As charitable works become praiseworthy, people often perform them merely for the sake of fame and to gain benefit for themselves
subcodes.first_line_orig: اعمال خیریه چون ممدوحیت پیدا کرده لذا نفوس محض شهرت و جلب منفعت خود و تحسین خلق عمل خیر می کنند
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @goodly deeds; actions
